title: tragacantha sericophylla
intro: Tragacantha sericophylla, also known as the spiny treacle bedstraw or spiny catchfly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Tragacantha sericophylla include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
